text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, April 12. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and a quiet dinner with the family.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah found a new recipe to try. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Doing some cleaning around the house. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Home maintenance is a constant cycle. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Planning a street block party soon. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Catan is always a good time. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan's team played a match and won 2-1! The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Sounds exciting! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the grocery list ready. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Reading scientific papers late tonight. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Space science and tech is a great focus. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. I can help troubleshoot that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've noted the plans. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
